notes: Hotfixed Calendar event time selection when the dropdown stopped opening.
Replaced the time dropdown with a standard 24-hour TimePicker popup.
Removed the dropdown menu-height setting that could break the packaged Flet runtime.
Kept the compact Calendar event dialog layout and saved event data compatible.
Calendar event save still uses YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM values.
No Work folder, settings, or cache behavior is changed.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
